title: Refactor LSP-001 (LSP): Subclass nullifies a base class attribute required by a base class method.
apply_error: patch applied but produced no net source changes; the LLM replacement was likely identical to the matched text

detected_issue.description: Subclass nullifies a base class attribute required by a base class method.
detected_issue.reasoning: The Identity subclass (defined within the _identity method) sets the _spacer attribute to None. However, the base class Scale defines a method _spacing that attempts to call self._spacer(x). This ensures that any instance of the Identity subclass will raise a TypeError when _spacing is invoked, violating the principle that a subclass should be substitutable for its base class without breaking base class functionality.

fix_logic.summary: Fix LSP violation in Scale._identity by providing a valid _spacer implementation
fix_logic.rationale: The Identity subclass of Scale was setting _spacer to None, which caused a TypeError when the base class method _spacing was called. By setting _spacer to _default_spacer, the subclass now correctly implements the expected interface.
